description: Change request rejected — typical out-of-scope ask

values.originalMessage: Add a full booking system with payment, customer accounts, and a loyalty programme
values.reply: This is a bigger build than the existing booking module — let me put together a separate quote for it. I'll email you within 24 hours.

expected.subject: About your change request
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Your change request:

  Add a full booking system with payment, customer accounts, and a loyalty programme

My reply:

This is a bigger build than the existing booking module — let me put together a separate quote for it. I'll email you within 24 hours.

This one's outside what's covered by your monthly allowance, so
it doesn't count against your 3 requests this month. If you'd
like to discuss the bigger piece, just hit reply — happy to
quote separately.

You can see the full history (and submit other requests) on your
account dashboard.

— Ben
